summary: Frontend testing of venue image upload feature and Admin S3 settings. All core functionality verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

venue_owner_dashboard: 1. Create Venue dialog has 'Venue Images' section with upload area - PASS
2. 'Upload venue images' button visible in Create Venue dialog - PASS
3. Edit Venue dialog has 'Venue Images' section with upload area - PASS
4. Existing venue images shown as thumbnails in Edit dialog - PASS (1 thumbnail found)
5. 'Add more images' button visible when images exist - PASS
admin_settings_s3: 1. Settings tab accessible in Admin Console - PASS
2. AWS S3 Storage section displays all 4 fields (Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, Bucket Name, Region) - PASS
3. Test S3 Connection button is DISABLED when all S3 fields are empty - PASS
4. Test S3 Connection button becomes ENABLED after filling all 4 fields - PASS
5. 'Configured' / 'Not configured' status indicator shows correctly - PASS
6. Save All Settings button saves successfully with toast confirmation - PASS
backend_api_verification: 1. POST /api/upload/image returns 503 with 'S3 not configured' message when S3 not set up - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: VenueImageUpload component (lines 33-107) correctly implements image upload with S3 fallback handling
S3 warning displays in amber box when upload returns 503 status code
Test S3 Connection button correctly checks s3Configured state (line 290, 406)
All 4 S3 fields (access_key_id, secret_access_key, bucket_name, region) properly validated
uploadAPI.image() in api.js correctly sends multipart/form-data to /api/upload/image
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue image upload feature tested. VenueImageUpload component is in VenueOwnerDashboard.js (lines 33-107). Admin S3 settings in SuperAdminDashboard.js with Test S3 Connection button controlled by s3Configured variable. Note: The S3 warning message appears when backend returns 503. During testing via public URL, Cloudflare sometimes returns 520 instead of passing through 503 - this is infrastructure behavior, not app bug.

mocked_apis.upload: Returns 503 when S3 not configured - not mocked, real behavior

AdminS3Settings.test_connection_button: Disabled when any field empty, enabled when all 4 filled
